prompt: Create a polished app icon/logo for a Windows desktop AI coding assistant named "Leetcode". Concept: friendly local coding agent + Rust desktop app + project workspace. Visual: stylized lowercase L or angle-bracket code symbol integrated with a subtle robot/assistant face and a small file tree/grid motif. Modern minimal vector style, crisp edges, high contrast, suitable for app icon at small sizes. Color palette: deep navy background, electric cyan and warm orange accents inspired by Rust/coding, slight gradient, no photorealism, no clutter. Include no long text; if any text, only a simple abstract L mark. Centered composition, transparent-looking clean icon, professional software product logo.
